attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who capitalizes on early, large group moves rather than late solo attacks. Demonstrates ability to hold gaps in final 15km when positioned correctly.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team setup patterns across multiple races.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine specific terrain preferences, though capable of managing sustained efforts over final 15km.
vulnerability: Unknown - single race observation shows mental resilience but insufficient data to identify consistent weaknesses.
key_patterns: Wins from large breakaway groups (14 riders) rather than solo efforts.
Maintains composure under pressure when holding slim gaps in final kilometers.
Benefits from opportunistic situations (competitor mechanicals) to secure results.
form_trajectory: unknown: Single 2020 observation showing promise at age 23, but no trajectory data available
